title: myosotis sylvatica subsp. soleirolii
intro: Myosotis sylvatica subsp. soleirolii, also known as the alpine forget-me-not, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is native to Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of alpine forget-me-not include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support overall well-being.
